# NPS Registrar — Official Template Reference

Faithful transcriptions of the **official NPS registrar templates** provided by
Registrar **Marites C. Ramos** (SY 2026-2027). These are the authoritative layouts
that the rebuilt Registrar app must reproduce for Form 137, tracking records, and
teacher grading sheets.

> ⚠️ The original PDF files are the source of truth. Drop the actual PDFs alongside
> these markdown files in this folder so both the binary and the transcription are
> version-controlled:
>
> - `F137-TEMPLATE-FORM-ELEM.pdf`
> - `F137-TEMPLATE-FORM-JHS.pdf`
> - `TRANSFERRED-STUDENTS-DESTINATION-TRACKING-RECORD.pdf`
> - `SAMPLE-GRADING-SHEETS-SY-2026-2027.pdf`

## Contents

| File | What it defines |
|------|-----------------|
| [f137-elementary-permanent-record.md](f137-elementary-permanent-record.md) | Elementary Pupil's Permanent Record (Form 137) — Grade 1–6 layout |
| [f137-jhs-permanent-record.md](f137-jhs-permanent-record.md) | Junior High School Permanent Record (Form 137) — Grade 7–10 layout |
| [tracking-records.md](tracking-records.md) | Transferred-out / School Leavers / Graduates destination tracking records |
| [grading-sheet-computation.md](grading-sheet-computation.md) | Official subject grading-sheet columns + WW/PT/STE weights + transmutation + attitude |
| [report-card-grades-2-6.md](report-card-grades-2-6.md) | Form 138 report card — EXACT layout for Grades 2–6 (subjects per grade, special programs, deportment, attendance, valid-for-transfer + TO PDF) |
| [report-card-grades-7-10.md](report-card-grades-7-10.md) | Form 138 report card — EXACT layout for Grades 7–10 (JHS) — deltas vs elementary |
| [subject-grade-sheet-ui.md](subject-grade-sheet-ui.md) | Subject grade sheet encode/view UI (empty + encoded states, WW/PT/exam item columns, attitude, term grade) — with open questions |
| [descriptive-grading-k-3.md](descriptive-grading-k-3.md) | MATATAG descriptive grading A–E for Grades 1–3 (+ Kinder pending); phase-in Grade 1 first in SY 2026-2027 |

Signatory on all registrar-certified forms: **MARITES C. RAMOS, Registrar**.
Canonical school name: **Naga Parochial School**, City of Naga.
